results.title: Lionel Scaloni rechaza comparar el Argentina vs. Inglaterra con la Guerra de Malvinas
results.description: Lionel Scaloni pidió no mezclar política y fútbol en la previa del duelo entre Argentina e Inglaterra, recordó la Guerra de Malvinas y destacó el trabajo realizado por España en el Mundial 2026.

results.title: Report: Current AEW champion being discussed for future world title match
results.description: There are reportedly big plans in place for AEW TNT Champion Kevin Knight. A couple of months ago, AEW TNT Champion Kevin Knight turned heel and joined the Don Callis family. A part of the faction since June 2026, Knight has also maintained his status as the TNT Champion. Despite his run as the TNT [...]

results.title: Europe league, expansion, Kawhi probe, second apron all topics at NBA’s board of governors meeting
results.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — The NBA will be doing some international business alongside the FIFA World Cup final in the coming days, as it moves closer to the planned launch of a new league in Europe sometime in the fall of 2027. Commissioner Adam Silver, speaking after the league’s Board of Governors meeting on Tuesday [...]
